title: Patzkea coerulescens
taxonomy: Patzkea coerulescens is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Vanilloideae. Further classification places it in the tribe Vanilleae and the genus Patzkea. This plant is native to China and is a member of the orchid family. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchids.
